title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Lovely Professional University Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lovely Professional University Capital India:
Lovely Professional University Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University Capital India!
